title: Trump demands ‘unconditional surrender’ from Iran
description: US President Donald Trump has issued a blunt warning to Tehran – he won't accept a deal, only unconditional surrender. It follows the worst night of bombing in the Iranian capital since the war began, and the death toll from the war is rising into the thousands. #Trump #US #Tehran #Iran

title: Dubai Airport closed, all flights suspended
description: Emirates has confirmed all flights to and from Dubai have been suspended until further notice. It follows reports of explosions near the airport. Anyone trying to get out of the region is being told not to go to the airport. #Dubai #Dubaiairport #Emirates

title: Mexico deploys 100,000 security personnel ahead of World Cup
description: Mexico has deployed more than 100,000 security personnel ahead of this year's World Cup to protect fans. It comes amid ongoing cartel violence, including clashes between the military and the powerful Jalisco New Generation cartel, after last month's killing of its leader, El Mencho. #Mexico #security #worldcup
